# VLA-Tracker

> Benchmark tracking for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) robot models

VLA-Tracker is an open-source project that tracks 82 VLA models across 8 benchmarks (LIBERO, CALVIN, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, RLBench, RoboCasa, Meta-World, Real-World). It provides structured, machine-readable data on model architectures, benchmark scores, training details, and AI-generated paper reviews.

## Key Data

- 82 models tracked (2023–2026)
- 8 benchmarks with normalized scores
- 70 AI-generated paper reviews (26 PDF-verified)
- Auto-updated from arXiv weekly

## API Access (for AI agents)

Direct access (no JavaScript rendering required):

- Leaderboard JSON: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/data/leaderboard.json
- Full text data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/dashboard/public/llms-full.txt
- Model YAML files: https://github.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/models
- AI Reviews: https://github.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/ai_reviews
- Action Head Taxonomy: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/docs/action-head-taxonomy.md

After GitHub Pages deployment:
- Dashboard: https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/
- Static JSON: https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/leaderboard.json
- llms-full.txt: https://hyeongjinkim.github.io/Vla-tracker-/llms-full.txt

## Action Head Categories

Models are classified by core action generation mechanism:
- autoregressive (17): Sequential token prediction (OpenVLA, RT-2-X)
- diffusion (17): Gaussian denoising DDPM/DDIM (CogACT, Diffusion Policy)
- flow_matching (16): ODE velocity field (pi0, FLOWER, X-VLA)
- discrete_diffusion (4): Masked token denoising (DD-VLA, E0)
- regression (8): Single-pass direct prediction (OpenVLA-OFT, HPT)
- inverse_dynamics (3): Action from state transitions (UniPi, AVDC)
- hybrid (6): Two+ mechanisms combined (HybridVLA, Diffusion-VLA)
- other (11): Specialized/undisclosed

See taxonomy: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/docs/action-head-taxonomy.md

## Current Rankings (LIBERO Benchmark)

1. PLD — 99.0% avg (NVIDIA, Oct 2025) — other (RL framework)
2. SimpleVLA-RL — 98.8% (SJTU/PKU, Sep 2025) — autoregressive
3. X-VLA — 97.8% (Tsinghua/Shanghai AI Lab, Oct 2025) — flow_matching
4. Fast-WAM — 97.6% (Tsinghua/Galaxea, Mar 2026) — flow_matching
5. VLA-Thinker — 97.5% (UCF/NVIDIA, Mar 2026) — autoregressive

## Current Rankings (CALVIN Benchmark)

1. LingBot-VLA — 4.50 avg len (Ant Group) — flow_matching
2. UD-VLA — 4.50 avg len (Tsinghua) — discrete_diffusion
3. DreamVLA — 4.44 avg len (Shanghai AI Lab) — inverse_dynamics

## How to query this data

```python
import json, urllib.request
url = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/data/leaderboard.json"
data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(url).read())
for m in data["models"][:5]:
    cat = m["architecture"]["action_head_category"]
    print(f"{m['name']}: {m.get('libero_avg', 'N/A')} ({cat})")
```

## Sections

- [Model Data](https://github.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/models): YAML files with architecture, benchmarks, metadata
- [AI Reviews](https://github.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/tree/main/data/ai_reviews): Seminar-style reviews for 70 papers
- [Full Data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Index-23227/Vla-tracker-/main/dashboard/public/llms-full.txt): Complete model database for AI consumption
